code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  let n = string.len(line)
  mut sum = 0
  mut stopped = false
  mut cur = 0
  mut sign = 1
  mut in_num = false
  mut i = 0

  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      32
    end

    let is_ws = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13

    if is_ws
      if in_num and not stopped
        let value = cur * sign
        if value < 0
          stopped = true
        else
          sum = sum + value
        end
      end
      cur = 0
      sign = 1
      in_num = false
    else if b == 45
      sign = -1
      in_num = true
    else if b == 43
      in_num = true
    else
      cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
      in_num = true
    end

    i = i + 1
  end

  if in_num and not stopped
    let value = cur * sign
    if value < 0
      stopped = true
    else
      sum = sum + value
    end
  end

  print("partial=#{sum}")
end
